creator: decke@bluelife.at
text:
Mac OSX hosts and FreeBSD guests are supported upstream so please open
a Bug at https://www.virtualbox.org/wiki/Bugtracker as this is very
likely not a bug in FreeBSD itself but in VirtualBox. It helps if you
are able to attach your VBox.log which should give more details about
the crash and check if you find a similar bugreport.

--=20
Bernhard Fr=F6hlich
http://www.bluelife.at/
